textByHash.22f700b8c44e0f9fbb91b8288a267cec4ee57f03: Me'se can't wait for da chompy yumms...I's dribbling all down me's for da tasty chompy.
textByHash.314fbd23839673922ba3a307a1b3c33176eb4739: Me's gonna ged da pridy chompy hatsies...an looks like a good-un wiv da laydies.
textByHash.3aa609e3881db1f92dc931925ab1ae4be0d89d81: Mee's scared of Jiggig and da zogries, deyz is not da right dead-uns.
textByHash.8c581b62149bd49e1681e3eacee053c2fbfe6183: Yous creature doesn't stick mee's chompy, else mee's squeeze creature till yous a deadun!
textByHash.9d49550d2e382cbf891bd45677a2cc3f62aa3164: Mee's got no stabbers no more...gonna go home wiv no chompy...
textByHash.a5ea3925398428aeb21394d1e8eec66e13b2a7e5: Da fatsy toadies geddin' all messy...
textByHash.a9149c1707675dcaa7c975d6f989d97f34f53f89: Yous creatures too weedy for da ogre stabby chucker, yous best stick wiv da cluks-cluks.
textByHash.ea97802115e0379fe25ea397799bdc500ed547aa: De'se stabbers are worser dan a dead dog....
